sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_col XML, text_col VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, xml_col, text_col) VALUES (1, 'Abracadabra', 'Abracadabra');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, xml_col, text_col) VALUES (2, '', '');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, xml_col, text_col) VALUES (3, 'Test', 'Test');
SELECT id, starts_with(text_col, 'Abr') AS starts_test FROM test_table WHERE starts_with(xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col), 'A') = 1;
SELECT id, starts_with(text_col, 'Test') FROM test_table WHERE text_col IS NOT NULL AND starts_with(text_col, NULL) IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY starts_with(text_col, 'A') HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE starts_with(text_col, 'abc') = 0 AND xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, starts_with(CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(255)), 'A') AS null_test FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, starts_with(text_col, 'A') AS starts FROM test_table) AS sub WHERE starts = 1;
SELECT t.id FROM test_table t JOIN test_table2 t2 ON starts_with(t.text_col, 'A') = 1 AND t2.data_col IS NULL;
SELECT id, starts_with(CONCAT(text_col, 'add'), 'Abr') AS combined_test FROM test_table WHERE text_col != '';
